title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.6 — TEXT CONSISTENCY: value tiles (ParamSlider) now place their label + value with the EXACT same math + fonts as the selector tiles (label pinned top in a 12px band at y+5, value centered below; label 8pt, value 12pt). Selector value font unified to 12pt too (was per-LAF 11.5/13.5). So every tile — selector or value — reads identically now. DSP untouched. Remaining to fully match the mockup: GRIT deep controls -> TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, top-down GR meter, raise bottom section.
